evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Follow system design and architectural best practices and closely collaborate with cross-functional stakeholders to ensure data integrity and efficiency across all processes
evidence.data_team_maturity: We operate across four product verticals — Ride-Hailing, Delivery (Bolt Food and Bolt Market), Rentals (e-bikes, scooters, and carsharing), and Bolt Business — plus two horizontals: Platform and Incentives
evidence.jd_authorship: Develop strategic data products such as segmentation feature store or enable advanced solutions such as interactive metrics trees
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: You own everything between data producers and data consumers
evidence.autonomy_level: Work closely with product analysts and adjacent stakeholders to prioritize and align analytics engineering roadmaps
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Build, expand and maintain reusable data models and metrics in dbt

ai_role_quote: Build, expand and maintain reusable data models and metrics in dbt
ai_role_reasoning: Standard data modeling work with no AI skill expectations.
testing_framing_quote: ensure data integrity and efficiency across all processes
testing_framing_reasoning: Data integrity mentioned but no explicit quality/testing ownership or data contracts responsibility.
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Delivery-focused framing without compliance, regulatory, incident, or SLO-driven risk language.
